title: Incident: Billing Daily Failure on 2026-04-04
content:
The billing_daily DAG failed at 02:14 UTC after the customer_dim load step.
Primary trigger: the promotions feed stopped sending discount_code for several enterprise accounts after a schema change.
Downstream impact: billing_fact load aborted and late-arriving invoices were held in quarantine.
Mitigation: restore the nullable discount_code mapping, backfill customer_dim, and replay billing_daily.
Post-incident note: row counts recovered after the replay in staging but not yet in production.
